user.title: Set up APsystems inverter
user.description: Enter connection details and a name for your inverter.

data_description.ip_address: Local IP address of the inverter (static IP recommended).
data_description.device_name: Custom name, e.g. 'Balcony Solar' or 'Garage Solar'.
data_description.polling_interval: How often the inverter is queried (12–60 seconds). Lower values increase load on the inverter and may cause WLAN reconnects. Default: 12 seconds.
data_description.lifetime_offset_p1: Optional. Only fill in if the inverter's internal counter has already reset to 0 (known firmware bug at ~540 kWh). Enter the amount produced before the reset in kWh, e.g. '542.3'. Leave empty if no reset has occurred.
data_description.lifetime_offset_p2: Same as above but for input 2. Leave empty if no reset has occurred.

reconfigure.title: Update APsystems settings
reconfigure.description: Correct connection details or lifetime energy offsets.

data_description.lifetime_offset_p1: Currently stored offset for input 1. Only change if the value was entered incorrectly or a new reset has occurred.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter. Check IP address and port.
error.invalid_offset: Invalid offset value. Please enter a number in kWh, e.g. '542.3', or leave the field empty.

inverter_error.message: The inverter returned an error. It may be in standby or night mode.

inverter_unreachable.message: The inverter is not reachable. Check network connection and IP address.
